reach_why: Extends known continual-learning tradeoffs to evaluation instability and opaque truths, but does not open wholly new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links personalization, rehearsal, over-retention, benchmark drift, and uninterpretable yet real patterns.
falsifiable_why: Testable via continual-training experiments measuring fragmentation, retention harms, benchmark failure, and unlearning resistance.
explanation: Continual personalization plus rehearsal can preserve obsolete, opaque local behaviors, making improvement harder to evaluate.
